Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.model

Class Harmonic

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.model.Harmonic
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Harmonic>
public class Harmonic extends Object implements Comparable<Harmonic>
This class represents an Nth harmonic. Conversion between frequency and period is permitted.

  • Constructor Details

    • Harmonic

      public Harmonic(double frequency, int harmonic)
      Constructor
      Parameters:
      frequency - The particular frequency.
      harmonic - The harmonic represented by this frequency (1 = fundamental).

      public boolean isFundamental()
      Does this represent a fundamental frequency?
      Returns:
      Is this a fundamental frequency?

    • getPeriod

      public double getPeriod()
      Returns:
      The period (reciprocal of frequency).

    • getFundamentalFrequency

      public double getFundamentalFrequency()
      Return the fundamental frequency. If the harmonic number is 1, this is just the frequency itself.
      Returns:
      The fundamental frequency.

    • isHarmonic

      public boolean isHarmonic(Harmonic other)
      Is the specified harmonic a multiple of this one and the current one is a fundamental.
      Parameters:
      other - The other harmonic to check.
      Returns:
      Whether the specified harmonic is a multiple of this one.
